---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new adapter, domain extension, or workflow improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What compliance standard, domain, or workflow does it address?

- **Standard:** (e.g., ISO 26262, DO-178C, EN 50128, IEC 62304, SOTIF)
- **Domain:** (e.g., automotive, aerospace, medical, railway)
- **Artifact family:** (e.g., verification logs, FMEA exports, test reports)

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want AVERA to have. Be as specific as possible about inputs, outputs, and any edge cases.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links to relevant standards, existing tools, or example artifacts (anonymized).
